title: CUSAT Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Professor Posts
description: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Assistant Professor Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation, Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the CUSAT Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
